title: Load generator on same machine as target — results reflect resource contention
code_snippet:
# Run command:
# k6 run --vus 500 load_test.js
# targeting http://localhost:8080/api/orders
#
# Both k6 and the API server running on same 4-core dev laptop.
# Observed: p99=850ms at 200 RPS, CPU at 100%
violated_rule: Load generator not co-located — separate from target
expected_feedback: Standard: load generator and target are on the same machine. k6 and the server compete for CPU. Results reflect OS scheduling and resource contention, not service performance. Run k6 on a separate machine or in a separate container with resource limits.
coverage_rules: Load generator runs separately from target
Load generator on same machine as target
